titleStmt.title: SII 31.201: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 201. (A.R. No. B 275 of 1936.) INJĒḌU, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up under a margosa tree planted to the north of the Veṅkaṭēśvara temple.
This inscription is dated in Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Jyēshṭha ba. 30, corresponding to 1539 A.D. June 16, Monday.

It records the construction of a step well (naḍabhāvi) to the temple of Vēṅkaṭādri at Injēḍu by sthala-karaṇaṁ Paṇayya, son of Kasvarāju and registers the gift of wet land measuring 1/2 kha in extent situated at Liṁgaṁdinne for maitaining the well and 1/4 kha of wet land for maitaining the offerings and worship to the god Vēṅkaṭādri by certain Pāpināyiḍu, son of Māchināyiḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śaka
varuṣaṁbbulu 1461
Agunēṭi vikāri saṁvvatsara
jēṣṭha ba 30 lu śrīmatu I
ṁjēṭi staḷagaraṇaṁ kasva
rāju koḍuku pāṇa
yya yiṁjēṭi veṁkaṭādriki ma
hālessagānu manamayina naḍa
bhāvi kaṭṭiṁccenu . yī bhūmiki (bhāviki)
mācināyani pāpināyaniṁgā
ru peṭṭina mānyaṁcēnu vūriki tū¨rpu
liṁgaṁdinne teruvu cēnu khaṁ . nu
yiṁjēṭi veṁkaṭādriki naivēdyā paṁnne
rālakunnu Aṁgaraṁga vaibhavāḷu
lakunnu dhāravōsi Iccinaccēnu khaṁ .
yiṁdduku yavvaru tappināsu . tama
talli taṁḍrādulanu guruvulānu vāra
ṇāsilōsu caṁpina pāpānaṁbōdu
ru . kukkamāṁsa tiṁ
navāru . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁjē
yanu .
Digital edition of SII 31.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
